---
title: "Spruce up, Euclid Down"
---



```{=html}
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="North Berkeley" data-miles="11.59" data-elevation="1246.39" data-time="78" data-has-gravel="false">

<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="../data/routes/spruce-up-euclid-down/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>North Berkeley</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>11.59</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elevation Gain</span><br>1246.39 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Time</span><br>~1:18</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Steep Descent</span><br>0.07 mi</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br><span class="mobile-route-quality" style="background-color:#91cf60;">83%</span></p>
</div>
</article>
```
::: {.panel-tabset}

## Hazards

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/spruce-up-euclid-down/map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Hazard</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Flat</td>
      <td>6.71</td>
      <td>58.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Climb</td>
      <td>2.12</td>
      <td>18.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Light Descent</td>
      <td>1.60</td>
      <td>14.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Descent</td>
      <td>0.56</td>
      <td>5.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Steep Climb</td>
      <td>0.53</td>
      <td>5.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Steep Descent</td>
      <td>0.07</td>
      <td>1.0</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

## Climbs

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/spruce-up-euclid-down/chunk_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

### Climbs Only

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Section (avg grade)</th>
      <th>Climb (ft)</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Time (Min)</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>TOTAL</td>
      <td>1,110</td>
      <td>5.0</td>
      <td>44 ± 19</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>1. Gilman Street (1% avg)</td>
      <td>32</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>2 ± 0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>2. Monterey Avenue (5% avg)</td>
      <td>143</td>
      <td>0.6</td>
      <td>6 ± 2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>3. Spruce Street (7% avg)</td>
      <td>346</td>
      <td>1.0</td>
      <td>12 ± 6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>4. Wildcat Canyon Road (2% avg)</td>
      <td>402</td>
      <td>2.6</td>
      <td>18 ± 6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>5. Wildcat Canyon Road (6% avg)</td>
      <td>188</td>
      <td>0.5</td>
      <td>6 ± 3</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

### With Rest Periods

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Section (avg grade)</th>
      <th>Climb (ft)</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Time (Min)</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>TOTAL</td>
      <td>1,110</td>
      <td>11.5</td>
      <td>78 ± 28</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>1. Gilman Street (1% avg)</td>
      <td>32</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>2 ± 0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>2. Monterey Avenue (5% avg)</td>
      <td>143</td>
      <td>0.6</td>
      <td>6 ± 2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>3. Spruce Street (7% avg)</td>
      <td>346</td>
      <td>1.0</td>
      <td>12 ± 6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>4. Wildcat Canyon Road (2% avg)</td>
      <td>402</td>
      <td>2.6</td>
      <td>18 ± 6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>5. Wildcat Canyon Road (6% avg)</td>
      <td>188</td>
      <td>0.5</td>
      <td>6 ± 3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>6.1</td>
      <td>32</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

## Street Quality

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/spruce-up-euclid-down/road_quality_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>mtc_pci_info</th>
      <th>Miles</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Good</td>
      <td>4.7</td>
      <td>40.7</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Excellent</td>
      <td>2.2</td>
      <td>18.9</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Fair</td>
      <td>1.8</td>
      <td>15.3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Poor</td>
      <td>1.1</td>
      <td>9.6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Very Good</td>
      <td>0.8</td>
      <td>6.8</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Failed</td>
      <td>0.5</td>
      <td>4.5</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Gravel</td>
      <td>0.1</td>
      <td>0.9</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>At Risk</td>
      <td>0.0</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Unknown</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>3.2</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

:::
